note: Per-skill index: for each observed skill/ability, lists every talent that modifies it, where it sits in the tree, its parsed stat modification, and a mock value showing that modification applied to a normalized baseline of 10. Each modifying talent is tagged with one or more lanes from laneTaxonomy (DMG/CRIT/CDR/CAST/HASTE/SPEED/HEAL/SHIELD/MITIGATION/RESOURCE/COST/DURATION/AOE/CC/ARMOR/SUMMON/MISC), plus cross-cutting behavior flags (PROC, STACK) that describe how the effect triggers rather than what stat it touches. A handful of nodes have unresolved "$xx" template descriptions in the source export - these are flagged rather than guessed at.

Arbalist.baseDescription:
Level 30 Passive
Increases your attack power by 100% of your Intellect.

modifyingTalents.description:
Your Bola Throw now has 2 charges, deals additional damage, and lasts 2 additional sec, but now costs 10 Rage instead of mana.Purified Bola Throw2 Charges, 15 sec recharge
Throw a bola at an enemy, dealing 348 + 40% AP Holy damage and slowing movement speed by -60% for 8 seconds.

Your Bolt and Dash now affects an additional use of a Heartseeking Bolt.

Your Pavise now lasts 2 additional sec and has a -30 sec reduced cooldown.
Reduces the cooldown of your Brand spells by -25%.

Brand of the Unworthy.baseDescription:
Expose an enemy's darkest faults, disorienting them for 40 seconds (8 sec vs players).

Damage caused will end this effect. Only usable on Humanoids, Demons, and Undead.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Traps and Brands by -50%.

Brimming Hatred.baseDescription: Your critical strikes now generate 10 Rage. Can only occur every 3 sec.

Brooding Hatred.baseDescription: Increases your off-hand Weapon Damage by 40% and increases your chance to hit by 6%.

Brushin' Off The Dusk.baseDescription: Your off-hand auto attacks now have a 20% chance to strike 2 additional times.

Burned Alive.baseDescription: Increases your critical strike chance by 25% on enemies below 20% health.

Burrow Bolt.baseDescription: Shoot a bolt with a rope attached to it at an enemy dealing 6 + 25% AP Physical damage and pulling them to you.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Stoicism by -30 sec and Burrow Bolt by -5 sec.
Increases the duration that Traps last on the ground by 7 sec, reduces the cooldown of Burrow Bolt by -7 sec, and reduces the cost of Dawn Blade by -7.
Reduces the cooldown of Burrow Bolt by -10 sec.

Chains of Darkness.baseDescription: Pull all nearby enemies to you, dealing 84 + 55% shadow SP + 15% AP Shadow damage and taunting them for 3 seconds.

Combat Training.baseDescription: Increases your Physical damage dealt and parry chance by 6%.

Contract Killing.baseDescription: Increases damage dealt against enemies above 75% health and below 35% health by 15%.

Damnation.baseDescription:
Deplete your rage to shoot a powerful bolt dealing 130% Weapon Damage plus 6 Twilight Damage and converting each point of Rage into additional damage.

Only usable on enemies below 35% health.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Damnation against Undead and Demons by 25%.
Reduces the Rage cost of Tormentor and Damnation by -20%.
Critically striking with Damnation now refunds 40 Rage.

Level 40 Passive
Direct ranged damage dealt now has an 8% chance to grant you Slinging Bolts.Slinging Bolts (Proc)Your next Damnation is usable regardless of the target's current health. Lasts 20 seconds.

Can only occur once every 5 sec.
Damage dealt by Heartseeking Bolt and Damnation is increased by 15%, doubled against Undead or Demons or enemies affected by Shadow Trap.

Daring Escape.baseDescription: Jump backwards, causing all ranged attacks to miss you for 2 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Daring Escape now resets the cooldown of Vault and generates 10 Rage.

Dark Chivalry.baseDescription: Increases your Armor contribution from mail items by 100%.

Dark Intuition.baseDescription: Whenever you parry or dodge an attack, your attack speed is increased by 5%, and your parry chance by 2% for 15 seconds, stacking 2 times.

Dark Mind.baseDescription:
Level 30 Passive
Increases your critical strike rating by 25% of your Intellect.

modifyingTalents.description:
Curse an enemy, dealing 66 + 19.2% shadow SP + 14.6% AP Shadow damage every 2 sec and applying Dark Oath to you, reducing all damage taken by -5% for 8 seconds.

Your next Desecrate within 8 seconds now restores 15% of your maximum health and mana.

Dark Penance.baseDescription: Increases your Agility and your chance to parry and dodge by 4%.

Dark Power.baseDescription:
Level 30 Passive
You now gain 1 Stamina for every 2 Agility.

Dark Riposte.baseDescription: Parrying enemy attacks now restores 5% of your missing health and Rage.

Darkflock.baseDescription:
Channel for 8 seconds, commanding a flock of crows to deal 50 + 15% ranged AP + 85% SP Shadow damage to enemies in a wide cone every 2 sec.

Can channel while moving.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Shadow damage dealt now has a 5% chance to reduce the channel time of your next Darkflock within 15 seconds by -50%.
Striking at least 5 enemies with Darkflock now causes you to unleash a flock of crows around each enemy struck, dealing 762 + 78.75% SP + 45% ranged AP Twilight Damage over 9 seconds.

Level 10 Passive
You may now cast Darkslayer while moving.

Ranged attacks and abilities now have a 25% chance to shoot an additional shot, dealing 20% ranged AP Physical damage and generating 5 Rage.

Casting Darkslayer or Witchbane now applies a stack of Bounty Hunter to you for 8 seconds, which can be consumed by casting Heartseeking Bolt to deal an additional 305 + 45% SP + 30% ranged AP Physical damage, stacking 2 times.

Increases the damage of Darkslayer by 50%, but increases its cast time by 0.5 sec.

Your Heartseeking Bolt and Darkslayer now have a 25% chance to strike an additional time.
Your Quickdraw now additionally causes your next Darkslayer within 15 seconds to be instant cast.
Increases the damage of Darkslayer by 20%, increased by an additional 20% against Undead.

Increases the amount of stacks of Dawn and Dusk by 10.

In addition, reaching 20 stacks with both buffs will consume them to grant you 20% increased damage, melee haste, movement speed, and critical strike chance for 6 seconds.
Damage dealt by Dawn Blade is now increased by 5% for each stack of Pommel Smash on the target.

Damage dealt by Dawn Blade now deals an additional 20% of the damage dealt as Twilight Damage every 1 sec for 3 seconds.Shadow BrandMarks the target for 12 seconds, dealing 36 High Threat Shadow Damage over 12 seconds.

Your direct Physical critical strikes now grant allies Replenishment.

In addition, Dawn Blade is now guaranteed to critically strike against Undead or Demons.ReplenishmentRestores 1% maximum mana every 5 sec to allies within 100 yds for 15 seconds.
While below 75% maximum health, Dawn Blade now increases the critical strike chance of Noctis Blade by 40% for 10 seconds.

Level 50 Passive
Avoiding damage or dealing damage with auto attacks now has a 40% chance to grant you Dawn Knight.Dawn KnightYour next Dawn Blade within 15 seconds is free of cost and deals 25% increased damage.
Damage dealt by Dawn Blade now increases your health by 15% of the damage dealt for 8 seconds, stacking 3 times.
Increases the duration that Traps last on the ground by 7 sec, reduces the cooldown of Burrow Bolt by -7 sec, and reduces the cost of Dawn Blade by -7.

Level 10 Passive
Using Dawn Blade now grants you Flames of Sin for 3 sec, causing your auto attacks to deal an additional 30% of the damage dealt as Fire damage.

Granting yourself Flames of Sin in this way while it's already active will increase the current duration by 3 sec.

Level 20 Passive
Damage dealt by Dawn Blade now deals an additional 100% of the damage dealt over 10 seconds as Fire damage.
Increases the damage of Dawn Blade and Dusk Blade by 15%.
Dealing Physical damage now increases the damage dealt by Stake and Dawn Blade by 2% for 5 seconds, stacking 10 times.

Death Trap.baseDescription: Place a death trap on the ground lasting 1 minute that will curse the first enemy to approach it, marking them for death, causing them to take 3100 + 100% AP Shadow damage after 1 minute.

modifyingTalents.description: Arm yourself against evil, resetting the cooldown of all Traps and Decimate.

Desecrate.baseDescription:
Desecrate up to 8 enemies in front of you, dealing Weapon Damage plus 18 as Shadow damage, piercing resistances.

Only usable after avoiding an attack.

modifyingTalents.description:
Curse an enemy, dealing 66 + 19.2% shadow SP + 14.6% AP Shadow damage every 2 sec and applying Dark Oath to you, reducing all damage taken by -5% for 8 seconds.

Your next Desecrate within 8 seconds now restores 15% of your maximum health and mana.
Desecrate now restores 10 + 20% shadow SP + 10% AP health plus an additional 1% maximum health for each target struck affected by Shadow Brand.
Casting Desecrate now has a 15% chance to reset the cooldown of Noctis Blade.

Increases the amount of stacks of Dawn and Dusk by 10.

In addition, reaching 20 stacks with both buffs will consume them to grant you 20% increased damage, melee haste, movement speed, and critical strike chance for 6 seconds.

Dusk Blade.baseDescription: Strike an enemy with both weapons, dealing Weapon Damage plus 10 + 15% shadow SP Shadow damage, piercing resistances. Heals for 25% of damage dealt.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage of Dawn Blade and Dusk Blade by 15%.
Dealing Fire damage now increases the damage dealt by Torchlight and Dusk Blade by 2% for 5 seconds, stacking 10 times.
Damage dealt by Dusk Blade now has a 15% chance to reduce the mana cost of your next Purifier's Edge by -100%. This effect has a 25% chance to not be consumed by Purifier's Edge.

Dusk Knight.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your parry rating by 40% of your Agility and your dodge rating by 25% of your Intellect.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Edicts by 20%.

Enchanted Bolts.baseDescription: Increases your Magic damage dealt by 5% and your Armor penetration by 10%.

Evil Never Sleeps.baseDescription:
In the night time, your Agility is increased by 4%.

In the day time, your haste is increased by 3%.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the spell power scaling of Purifier's Edge and Fiery Judgement by 25%.

Level 40 Passive
Casting Purifier's Edge or Fiery Judgement now has a 30% chance to allow the use of Stake within 8 seconds regardless of the target's health percentage.

Strike an enemy with searing blades, dealing Weapon Damage plus 20 with both weapons as Fire damage.

Grants Flames of Sin or increases the duration by 3 sec.

Judge an enemy, dealing 361 + 40% AP + 100% fire SP Fire damage to them and nearby enemies.

Grants Flames of Sin or increases the duration by 3 sec.
Empower a lantern with your Flames of Sin and let it shine, dealing 291 + 15% AP Fire damage and stunning all enemies within 5 yds for 5 seconds.

Your Smite Evil now has a 25% chance to strike again.

While you have Flames of Sin active, the chance to trigger this effect is increased by 10%.

Perform an advanced flourish, dealing 207 + 100% AP Fire damage to nearby enemies, repeating every 4 sec, and causing your Flames of Sin to cleave up to 3 additional enemies for 20 seconds.

Grants you Flames of Sin and increases the duration by 10 sec.

Throw a torch at an enemy, dealing 166 + 30% AP + 45% fire SP Fire damage, and causing up to 5 of the next attacks you make against them to grant you Flames of Sin and increasing the duration by 2 sec.

Drive your concealed stake into the chest of an injured enemy, dealing 197 + 67.5% AP Physical damage.

Grants Flames of Sin and increases the duration by 3 sec.

Only usable on enemies at or below 35% health.
Increases the amount of next attacks that grant Flames of Sin through Torchlight by 5.

Dealing damage with Flames of Sin now grants 2% attack speed, stacking up to 12 times for 6 seconds. Application of this effect does not refresh the duration.

Additionally, Pyro Tonic now also resets the cooldown of Torchlight.

Gaze of the Black Knight.baseDescription:
Apply a dark shield to yourself, absorbing 3255 + 700% Stamina + 41% AP damage and then gaze upon your party members, causing 25% of the damage they take to be transferred to you for 12 seconds.

Damage which reduces your health below 20% will break the effect.

Usable while stunned.

Grasp of the Undying.baseDescription:
Level 10 Passive
Auto attacks while wielding a two-handed weapon now have a 25% chance to unleash Grasp of the Undying, leeching 20 + 15% SP + 10% AP health from the target.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage of Noctis Blade and Grasp of the Undying by 20% on enemies affected by Shadow Brand.
Your Grasp of the Undying now strikes 2 additional nearby enemies.

Guard Strike.baseDescription: Bash an enemy with your weapon's hilt, interrupting them and preventing any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 3 seconds.

Heartless.baseDescription: Increases your Physical ranged critical damage by 30%.

Heartseeking Bolt.baseDescription:
Charge up a powerful bolt that deals 200% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 40 + 50% ranged AP + 30% shadow SP to an enemy and reduces their healing received by -30% for 10 seconds.

Generates Rage based on the damage dealt.

modifyingTalents.description:
Level 20 Passive
Your Heartseeking Bolt is now guaranteed to critically strike on enemies below 20% health and it now restores 10% of your maximum mana.
Increases the critical strike chance of Heartseeking Bolt by 20%.
Casting Heartseeking Bolt now increases your Physical damage dealt by 10% for 8 seconds.
Damage dealt by Heartseeking Bolt and Damnation is increased by 15%, doubled against Undead or Demons or enemies affected by Shadow Trap.

Your next Heartseeking Bolt within 10 seconds deals 25% more damage and incurs no cooldown.

When this buff is consumed you gain 50% increased movement speed for 3 seconds.

Casting Darkslayer or Witchbane now applies a stack of Bounty Hunter to you for 8 seconds, which can be consumed by casting Heartseeking Bolt to deal an additional 305 + 45% SP + 30% ranged AP Physical damage, stacking 2 times.

Your Bolt and Dash now affects an additional use of a Heartseeking Bolt.

Your Pavise now lasts 2 additional sec and has a -30 sec reduced cooldown.

Increases the damage of Darkslayer by 50%, but increases its cast time by 0.5 sec.

Your Heartseeking Bolt and Darkslayer now have a 25% chance to strike an additional time.
Direct ranged attacks and abilities now have a 5% chance to reset the cooldown of Houndmaster's Call.
Using Houndmaster's Call summons 1 Lesser Shadow Hound for 15 seconds that leaps at the target and deals 217 Shadow damage.

Level 10 Passive
Your ranged auto attacks now generate Rage.

In addition, teaches you Houndmaster's Whistle.Houndmaster's WhistleSummons a permanent Shadowhound companion to aid you in combat.

Your Shadowhound receives 25% of healing done to you.

Hunt.baseDescription:
2 Charges, 25 sec recharge
Charge an enemy, slowing their movement speed by -70% for 2 seconds and generating 20 Rage.

modifyingTalents.description: Hunt now generates an additional 15 Rage and the mana cost is reduced by -15%.
Hunt now slows movement speed by an additional 2 sec.

Inquisitor's Trap.baseDescription: Place a cruel trap on the ground lasting 1 minute that will curse the first enemy to approach it silencing them and all enemies in a 5 yd radius for 6 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Summon 1 Lesser Shadow Hound to aid you in combat for 20 seconds.
Casting Unleash The Hounds now has a 50% chance to summon an additional Lesser Shadow Hound for 15 seconds.
Using Houndmaster's Call summons 1 Lesser Shadow Hound for 15 seconds that leaps at the target and deals 217 Shadow damage.

Malice.baseDescription:
Level 30 Passive
Increases your Fire spell damage by 50% of your Agility and your attack power by 100% of your Intellect.

March of the Black King.baseDescription:
Expel darkness from within you, dealing 55 Shadow damage to nearby enemies over 10 seconds.

Generates 5 Rage every 2 sec.

modifyingTalents.description: Your March of the Black King now increases your Armor by 15%.

Mechanized Crossbows.baseDescription: Increases your ranged attack power by 10% and the range of your ranged abilities by 5 yds.

Monster Hunting.baseDescription:
Increases melee and ranged haste of party and raid members within 100 yds by 10%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your damage dealt against Undead and Demons by 10%.

Night Stalker.baseDescription: Increases your critical strike chance by 6%.

Noctis Blade.baseDescription: Strike an enemy, dealing 100% Weapon Damage plus 26, scaling with your parry rating, and healing you for 150% of the damage dealt.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage of Noctis Blade and Grasp of the Undying by 20% on enemies affected by Shadow Brand.
Casting Noctis Blade now applies a shield absorbing 166 + 200% Stamina + 10% AP damage for 4 seconds.
Casting Desecrate now has a 15% chance to reset the cooldown of Noctis Blade.

Attacks which would otherwise kill you now heal you for 50% maximum health and increases the damage of Noctis Blade by 50% for 6 seconds.

Can only occur once every 2 min.
While below 75% maximum health, Dawn Blade now increases the critical strike chance of Noctis Blade by 40% for 10 seconds.
Noctis Blade now consumes Shadow Brand to deal 50% increased damage.

Teaches you how to use Shields and teaches you Pavise.PaviseSlam your shield into the ground, forming a pavise for 10 sec.

While you remain near it, hostile spells targeting you are deflected.

Your Bolt and Dash now affects an additional use of a Heartseeking Bolt.

Your Pavise now lasts 2 additional sec and has a -30 sec reduced cooldown.

Plagueland Survivalist.baseDescription: Reduces the duration of disease effects on you by -30%.

modifyingTalents.description: Damage dealt by Dawn Blade is now increased by 5% for each stack of Pommel Smash on the target.
Your Pommel Smash now strikes an additional nearby enemy.
Damage dealt by Pommel Smash now has a 20% chance to trigger a Shadowstorm.ShadowstormLeeches 350 + 30% SP + 10% AP health from enemies within 8 yds.
Purifier's Edge now grants you Searing Hilt for 10 seconds.Searing HiltIncreases your melee attack speed by 10% for 10 seconds.
Increases the spell power scaling of Purifier's Edge and Fiery Judgement by 25%.

Level 40 Passive
Casting Purifier's Edge or Fiery Judgement now has a 30% chance to allow the use of Stake within 8 seconds regardless of the target's health percentage.
Damage dealt by Dusk Blade now has a 15% chance to reduce the mana cost of your next Purifier's Edge by -100%. This effect has a 25% chance to not be consumed by Purifier's Edge.

Main-hand auto attacks now apply a stack of Purity to the target, increasing the Fire and Holy damage you deal to them by 2% per stack, stacking 6 times.

Off-hand auto attacks now apply a stack of Wickedness to the target, increasing the Shadow and Physical damage you deal to them by 2% per stack, stacking 6 times.

Torchlight can now consume these stacks to deal 1028 + 25% holy SP + 45% AP Holyflame or Shadowstrike damage to the target.

Pyro Tonic.baseDescription: Drink a fiery tonic, increasing your Fire damage dealt by 20% and your critical damage by 10% for 15 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description:
Dealing damage with Flames of Sin now grants 2% attack speed, stacking up to 12 times for 6 seconds. Application of this effect does not refresh the duration.

Additionally, Pyro Tonic now also resets the cooldown of Torchlight.

Quickdraw.baseDescription:
Unleash a quick shot, dealing 175% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 16 + 20% ranged AP Physical damage and generates Rage.

Only usable after critically striking with an ability.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the critical damage of Quickdraw by 50%.
Reduces the cooldown of Quickdraw by -4 sec.
Your Quickdraw now additionally causes your next Darkslayer within 15 seconds to be instant cast.

Your direct Physical critical strikes now grant allies Replenishment.

In addition, Dawn Blade is now guaranteed to critically strike against Undead or Demons.ReplenishmentRestores 1% maximum mana every 5 sec to allies within 100 yds for 15 seconds.

Repulse.baseDescription: Emit a burst of shadow from your musket that strikes enemies in front of you, dealing 57 Shadow damage and knocking all affected targets back.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Repulse now resets the cooldown of Vault and makes your next Vault within 6 seconds free of cost.

Resilient to Darkness.baseDescription: Direct Magic damage taken now heals you and restores mana to you equal to 3% of the damage done.

Secret Society.baseDescription: Increases your Shadow critical strike chance and Shadow damage dealt by 8% and your expertise by 10.

Sermon of Flame.baseDescription: Increases your Fire damage dealt by 10%.

Shadow Brand.baseDescription: Direct ability damage now applies Shadow Brand to enemies.Shadow BrandMarks the target for 12 seconds, dealing 36 High Threat Shadow Damage over 12 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage of Shadow Brand by 40% and your hit rating by 6% of your Agility.
Increases the damage of Noctis Blade and Grasp of the Undying by 20% on enemies affected by Shadow Brand.
Desecrate now restores 10 + 20% shadow SP + 10% AP health plus an additional 1% maximum health for each target struck affected by Shadow Brand.
Noctis Blade now consumes Shadow Brand to deal 50% increased damage.
Casting Shadowblast now grants Shadow Rage to your Shadow Hound.Shadow RageAuto attacks have a 50% chance to deal an additional 57*1+AP*0.07t Shadow Damage. Lasts 15 seconds.
Increases the critical strike chance of you and your Shadow Hound by 4%.
Critical strikes now apply Scent of Magic for 15 seconds, causing your Shadow Hound's next Shadow Leap to incur a -10 sec reduced cooldown.
Command your Shadow Hounds to leap upon an enemy target, dealing two strikes for 1164 + 30% ranged AP Shadow damage.
Increases the Shadow damage dealt by your Shadow Hounds by 10%.
Empowers your Shadow Hounds for 20 seconds, granting them 30% increased damage and haste and allowing them to ignore Armor.
Critical strikes with ranged auto attacks now increase the melee haste of your Shadow Hounds by 10% for 5 seconds.

Level 40 Passive
When you take damage that would reduce your health to 35% or less, you summon 3 lesser Shadow Hounds and reset the cooldown of Vault.

Can only occur once every 2 min.
Your Shadow Hounds melee attacks now cleave 1 additional nearby enemy.
Your and your Shadow Hounds critical damage dealt with Shadow damage is increased by 50%, but the cost of your spells and abilities is increased by 25%.
Shadow Rage now also grants your Shadow Hounds 10% increased haste and it now stacks 3 additional times.
Critical strikes now apply Scent of Magic for 15 seconds, causing your Shadow Hound's next Shadow Leap to incur a -10 sec reduced cooldown.
Increases the damage of Shadow Rage by 20% of your ranged attack power.
Casting Unleash the Hounds now casts Shadow Rage on you for 10 seconds.Shadow RageRanged auto attacks deal an additional 50 Shadow Damage.
Shadow Rage now also grants your Shadow Hounds 10% increased haste and it now stacks 3 additional times.

Shadow Trap.baseDescription: Place a dark trap on the ground lasting 30 seconds that will curse the first enemy to approach it and up to 5 enemies within 3 yds, stunning them for 4 seconds and dealing 461 + 136% AP Shadow damage over 8 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Damage dealt by Heartseeking Bolt and Damnation is increased by 15%, doubled against Undead or Demons or enemies affected by Shadow Trap.
Reduces the Rage cost of Witchbane and Shadowblast by -20% and increases your chance to hit by 4%.
Increases the critical strike chance of Shadowblast by 10%.
Increases the damage of Shadowblast by 20% and Witchbane by 10%.
Increases the damage of Shadowblast by 20% and your hit chance by 4%.
Casting Shadowblast now grants Shadow Rage to your Shadow Hound.Shadow RageAuto attacks have a 50% chance to deal an additional 57*1+AP*0.07t Shadow Damage. Lasts 15 seconds.

Level 20 Passive
Casting Shadowblast now regenerates 5% of your maximum mana.
Reduces the Rage cost of Shadowblast, Vault, and Unleash the Hounds by -10.

Level 10 Passive
Your ranged auto attacks now generate Rage.

In addition, teaches you Houndmaster's Whistle.Houndmaster's WhistleSummons a permanent Shadowhound companion to aid you in combat.

Your Shadowhound receives 25% of healing done to you.
Increases the damage of Sixfold Shot by 25% and causes it to channel 0.5 sec quicker.

Slayer.baseDescription:
Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your critical strike chance by 3%.

Slayer of Darkness.baseDescription:
Increases damage dealt by 5% when fighting Demons or Undead. 

Additionally, direct damage dealt with spells or abilities now has a 10% chance to deal 151 Holy damage.

Slayer's Mark.baseDescription:
Mark an enemy, increasing the attack power of all attackers against that target by 150 and your critical strike chance against them by 3%, increasing by 3% every 1 sec for 8 seconds.

For the duration, the enemy is unable to stealth.

Smite Evil.baseDescription: Strike an enemy with your blade, dealing Weapon Damage plus 25 as Holy damage to them and 5 nearby enemies.

modifyingTalents.description:
Your Smite Evil now has a 25% chance to strike again.

While you have Flames of Sin active, the chance to trigger this effect is increased by 10%.

Throw down a smoke grenade, enemies are unable to target into or out of the Smoke for 8 seconds. 

Any damage caused will remove the effect.

All allies in the Smoke area gain 40% increased movement speed and all enemies have their movement speed slowed by -60%.
Reduces the cooldown of Smoke Grenade by -30 sec and increases its duration by 1 sec.

Level 40 Passive
Casting Purifier's Edge or Fiery Judgement now has a 30% chance to allow the use of Stake within 8 seconds regardless of the target's health percentage.
Dealing Physical damage now increases the damage dealt by Stake and Dawn Blade by 2% for 5 seconds, stacking 10 times.

Level 50 Passive
Stake is now guaranteed to critically strike enemies above 75% health.
Damage dealt by Stake now ignores enemy armor and its critical strikes refund half of its cost.
Increases the duration of Stoicism by 5 sec.
Reduces the cooldown of Stoicism by -30 sec and Burrow Bolt by -5 sec.
Using a Tonic now reduces the cooldown of all other Tonics by -10 sec.

Direct ability damage with a two-handed weapon now reduces the remaining cooldown of your Tonics by -1 sec and grants Witching.
WitchingIncreases magic resistances by 10%, and melee haste by 10% for 8 seconds, stacking 3 times.
Drinking Tonics now also restores 30 Rage.
Drinking Tonics now also restores 5% of your maximum health and mana.
Increases the effectiveness of your Tonics by 50%.
Increases the duration of Tonics by 5 sec.
Using a Tonic now reduces the cooldown of all other Tonics by -10 sec.
Increases the damage of Torchlight by 100%.
Increases the amount of next attacks that grant Flames of Sin through Torchlight by 5.
Dealing Fire damage now increases the damage dealt by Torchlight and Dusk Blade by 2% for 5 seconds, stacking 10 times.

Dealing damage with Flames of Sin now grants 2% attack speed, stacking up to 12 times for 6 seconds. Application of this effect does not refresh the duration.

Additionally, Pyro Tonic now also resets the cooldown of Torchlight.

Main-hand auto attacks now apply a stack of Purity to the target, increasing the Fire and Holy damage you deal to them by 2% per stack, stacking 6 times.

Off-hand auto attacks now apply a stack of Wickedness to the target, increasing the Shadow and Physical damage you deal to them by 2% per stack, stacking 6 times.

Torchlight can now consume these stacks to deal 1028 + 25% holy SP + 45% AP Holyflame or Shadowstrike damage to the target.

Tormentor.baseDescription: Fire a deadly bolt dealing cond(gt(SPS, SPH), 5+0+SPS*0.175, 5+0+SPH*0.175) Twilight Damage plus 63 + 87.5% ranged AP over 14 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the Rage cost of Tormentor and Damnation by -20%.
Critical strikes with ranged abilities now spread Tormentor to a nearby enemy.

Level 50 Passive
Your Tormentor can now critically strike.
Reduces the cooldown of your Trap spells by -25%.
Increases the duration of your Traps by 50%.
Increases the duration that Traps last on the ground by 7 sec, reduces the cooldown of Burrow Bolt by -7 sec, and reduces the cost of Dawn Blade by -7.
Arm yourself against evil, resetting the cooldown of all Traps and Decimate.
Reduces the mana cost of your Traps and Brands by -50%.

Twilight Frenzy.baseDescription:
Spin around, unable to stop moving for 5 seconds, firing shots at nearby enemies for 50% Ranged Weapon Damage plus cond(gt(SPS, SPH), 15+31+SPS*0.2+ranged AP*0.1, 15+31+SPH*0.2+ranged AP*0.1) as Twilight Damage.

Can dodge and parry while active.

modifyingTalents.description: While Twilight Frenzy is active, your movement speed is now increased by 40%.
Twilight Frenzy now grants you -20% reduced damage taken while active.
Increases the duration of Twilight Frenzy by 5 sec, and gives damage dealt by it a 15% chance to strike again.
Casting Unleash The Hounds now has a 50% chance to summon an additional Lesser Shadow Hound for 15 seconds.
Reduces the Rage cost of Shadowblast, Vault, and Unleash the Hounds by -10.
Casting Unleash the Hounds now casts Shadow Rage on you for 10 seconds.Shadow RageRanged auto attacks deal an additional 50 Shadow Damage.

Vampire Hunter.baseDescription:
When an enemy applies a curse to you, your Magic damage taken is reduced by -10% for 8 seconds.

The damage reduction is increased by 5% and duration is increased by 2 seconds for every curse active.

Vampiric Tonic.baseDescription: Drink a vampiric tonic, allowing Physical damage dealt to heal you equal to 20% of the damage dealt for 10 seconds.

Vault.baseDescription:
Dash in the direction you are moving. Distance scales with movement speed.

Not usable while rooted.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Daring Escape now resets the cooldown of Vault and generates 10 Rage.
Increases the base range of Vault by 3 yds.
Your Vault now regenerates 5% maximum mana.
You now drop caltrops below you each time you use Vault that last 6 seconds.
Reduces the Rage cost of Shadowblast, Vault, and Unleash the Hounds by -10.

Level 40 Passive
When you take damage that would reduce your health to 35% or less, you summon 3 lesser Shadow Hounds and reset the cooldown of Vault.

Can only occur once every 2 min.
Your Repulse now resets the cooldown of Vault and makes your next Vault within 6 seconds free of cost.

Veiled in Darkness.baseDescription:
A veil of dark magic encircles you at all times, granting 5% increased Attack Power to party and raid members within 100 yds.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Vengeful Intent.baseDescription: Whenever you take direct damage you have a 10% chance to strike back for 75% Weapon Damage.

modifyingTalents.description:
Main-hand auto attacks now apply a stack of Purity to the target, increasing the Fire and Holy damage you deal to them by 2% per stack, stacking 6 times.

Off-hand auto attacks now apply a stack of Wickedness to the target, increasing the Shadow and Physical damage you deal to them by 2% per stack, stacking 6 times.

Torchlight can now consume these stacks to deal 1028 + 25% holy SP + 45% AP Holyflame or Shadowstrike damage to the target.

Witchbane.baseDescription: Unleash a series of devastating shots dealing 60 + 45% ranged AP Physical damage over 3 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the Rage cost of Witchbane and Shadowblast by -20% and increases your chance to hit by 4%.
Allows Witchbane to hit an additional nearby enemy.
Your Witchbane now deals its full damage over -1 second shorter period.
Each subsequent shot of a Witchbane cast deals 15% more damage, up to a maximum of 150%.
Increases the damage of Shadowblast by 20% and Witchbane by 10%.

Casting Darkslayer or Witchbane now applies a stack of Bounty Hunter to you for 8 seconds, which can be consumed by casting Heartseeking Bolt to deal an additional 305 + 45% SP + 30% ranged AP Physical damage, stacking 2 times.

Witchblight.baseDescription:
Explode with dark energy, dealing 51 + 50% shadow SP + 20% AP Shadow damage to up to to 10 enemies within 8 yds and healing you for 20% of your maximum health.

Each target struck is guaranteed to miss their next instance of damage within 6 seconds.

Witchblood Tonic.baseDescription: Drink a shadowy tonic, removing all curse effects from you and reducing all Magic damage taken by -40% for 10 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description:
Direct ability damage with a two-handed weapon now reduces the remaining cooldown of your Tonics by -1 sec and grants Witching.
WitchingIncreases magic resistances by 10%, and melee haste by 10% for 8 seconds, stacking 3 times.

Witching Idol.baseDescription: Drop a Witching Idol that periodically dispels fear, sleep, and charm effects every 3 sec from party members within 20 yds.

Witching Shroud.baseDescription:
Enter a powerful stealth mode for 3 seconds, granting immunity to all harmful magic effects.

Only usable for 10 seconds after being hit by a magical critical strike. Usable while stunned or feared.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Witching Shroud by -10 sec when you are struck by a Shadow or Arcane critical strike.
